allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path")
Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter \\"Name='node.exe'\\" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List")

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '34172,39396,3696,39016,17952,24864,21408,9532,9628 | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id')
Bash(PGPASSWORD=secret psql -h localhost -U reposentinel -d reposentinel -c "SELECT key, value FROM \\"AppSetting\\" WHERE value LIKE '%repowatch%';")

Bash(psql -h localhost -p 5432 -U reposentinel -d reposentinel -c "SELECT key, value FROM \\"AppSetting\\" WHERE key LIKE 'ai.review.%agent%' OR key = 'ai.review.model' OR key = 'ai.review.cliPath';")
